description: A failed release pipeline has left the 'release-management' namespace in a broken state. Restore the environment so that all services have at least one pod in a healthy Running state. This requires rolling back 'frontend-web' to the last revision using 'nginx:1.26-alpine', updating the 'api-backend' deployment strategy to 'RollingUpdate' (maxUnavailable: 0, maxSurge: 1), resuming the paused 'data-processor' rollout, and rolling back 'notification-service' to its previous working revision. Access the system via Rancher at https://localhost (admin / Admin12345678!) or the terminal.
